art_market.summary: The global art market displays cautious optimism in 2026, with a focus on selectivity and high-value quality works over volume.
key_trends: Selectivity in acquisitions; quality works hold strong despite market corrections.
Postwar and Contemporary sectors undergoing gradual structural reset.
Increased buyer confidence in Modern art and Old Masters sectors.

korean_market.summary: KOSPI closed higher at 5,781.2 (+0.31%) on March 20, 2026, benefiting from easing geopolitical tensions.
korean_market.sentiment: Cautious optimism; investors balancing geopolitical risks with semiconductor optimism.
